generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're debating civil defense budgets, foreign adversaries are actively undermining our preparedness? The same people who claim to care about national security are blocking common-sense measures that would protect our communities. Don't let them distract you with empty rhetoric - real security requires real investment in civil defense. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
